item.title: Ancient DNA reveals a lost population near Paris replaced by strangers
item.description: Ancient DNA from a tomb near Paris reveals a shocking prehistoric reset: one population vanished and was replaced by newcomers from the south. The two...

item.title: Scientists stunned as JWST finds ice clouds on a giant alien planet
item.description: Scientists have discovered unexpected water-ice clouds on a distant, Jupiter-like exoplanet, challenging current atmospheric models. By directly imagi...

item.title: DNA reveals a hidden pitviper species in China
item.description: A vivid green pitviper hiding in Sichuan’s misty mountains has been revealed as a completely new species. Scientists had overlooked it for decades, as...

item.title: This donut-shaped discovery just shattered a 150-year math rule
item.description: A 150-year-old rule in geometry has been proven wrong. Mathematicians found two different doughnut-shaped surfaces that look identical when measured l...
